## Type of change

- [ ] chore

## How to test

<!-- List clear verification steps. -->

- [ ] `npm install`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and minimal.
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed.
- [ ] I verified there are no unrelated file changes.
